meta.description: Starter abilities for Emberfall party combat prototype

abilities.name: Fireball
abilities.description: Hurls a blazing fireball at a single enemy, dealing magical damage.

abilities.name: Healing Light
abilities.description: Bathes an ally in restorative light, recovering health.

abilities.name: Battle Cry
abilities.description: Lets out a fearsome shout, boosting physical attack power.
